title: carex doenitzii var. okuboi
intro: Carex doenitzii var. okuboi, also known as Okuboi Sedge, is a type of sedge plant native to Japan, belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Okuboi Sedge can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Japanese medicine, Kampo, to treat various conditions.
